steps.t: The wounded devoted can be found near Aiglos. You should confront the wounded devoted from the Order of the Eye.
Aiglos can be found in Dor Amarth. You should bring the corrupted idol you found to Aiglos.
The wounded devoted can be found near Aiglos. You should confront the wounded devoted from the Order of the Eye.
Legolas can be found near Aiglos in Dor Amarth. You should speak with Legolas.
Hithgol can be found at the Ruins of Díngarth. You should talk to Hithgol.
